summary: Crypto markets show mixed signals with Bitcoin facing correction risks after a local high amid profit-taking, while prediction markets remain optimistic around $82K levels. Commodities like gold are featured in live trading sessions with no clear directional bias. Broader markets anticipate modest growth and easing rates, supporting cautious bullishness in risk assets.

signals.reason: Multiple videos indicate bullish setup with anticipated rally to $85K, though DegenDave warns of trap/pullback zones requiring careful entry timing
